arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic: Four changes in our expected team v Lincoln City!
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic squad and predicts the 11 men who Shaun Maloney will select to start against Lincoln City at the Brick Community Stadium on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic chief makes 'permanent move' statement ahead of transfer deadline
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney has revealed the sale of Thelo Aasgaard means there 'might be some more room now' to bring in a player - and on a permanent basis.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic v Lincoln City injury and team news as 11 out and 2 doubts
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic are in EFL League One action on Saturday when they host Lincoln City at the DW Stadium.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic Academy product joins MK Dons from St Johnstone
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic Academy product Jack Sanders has joined League Two outfit MK Dons from Scottish Premiership outfit St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: Former Wigan Athletic winger joins Chesterfield from Brentford
arts.sum: Former Wigan Athletic loanee Michael Olakigbe has joined League Two outfit Chesterfield from Brentford for the rest of the season.

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic reveal new boardroom shake-up including new MD, non-executive chair and stadium MD
arts.sum: Wigan Athletic have a new managing director in the shape of Sarah Guilfoyle, who steps up from her previous role as club secretary.

arts.ttl: Lincoln City man was wanted by League Two side before Chesterfield move
arts.sum: Lincoln City winger Dylan Duffy was wanted by Morecambe before his move to Chesterfield, the Shrimps’ boss Derek… The post Lincoln City man was wanted by League Two side before Chesterfield move appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: PART 2: Wigan Athletic: The 12th Man - ‘I foresee our struggles lasting well beyond this week if we do not shrewdly reinvest’
arts.sum: In the two of a two-part bumper 12th Man, our panel of Latics experts run the rule over a win and loss in the league...but the disaster of losing talisman Thelo Aasgaard in the final week of the transfer window...

arts.ttl: Wigan Athletic chief on life beyond Thelo - 'My biggest challenge...'
arts.sum: Shaun Maloney has opened up on his 'biggest challenge' at the moment as Wigan Athletic manager.

Wigan are not completely clear of relegation just yet with Tuesday's defeat at Peterborough, combined with others winning below them, leaving them just nine points above the drop. The Latics have onl...
